creator: obrien@NUXI.com
text:
> diff -ruN /usr/ports/emulators/spim/Makefile spim/Makefile
> --- /usr/ports/emulators/spim/Makefile Thu Jun  8 00:44:16 2000
> +++ spim/Makefile      Sat Sep 30 12:46:58 2000
> @@ -1,4 +1,3 @@
> -# ex:ts=8

Why are you removing my "ex:ts=8"??

> -pre-configure:
> -      @${RM} -f ${WRKSRC}/y.tab.*

This was done for a reason.  In your updated version of the port you did
not address what this did.

> +XFREE86_HTML_MAN=     yes
..snip..
> +@cwd %%X11BASE%%
> +lib/X11/doc/html/spim.1.html
> +lib/X11/doc/html/xspim.1.html

It was my understanding bsd.port.mk would take care of this.
In the XFree86 3.3.6 case there is no lib/X11/doc/html/

> diff -ruN /usr/ports/emulators/spim/pkg-plist spim/pkg-plist
> --- /usr/ports/emulators/spim/pkg-plist        Wed Jun  7 19:51:54 2000
> +++ spim/pkg-plist     Thu Sep 14 15:49:50 2000
..snip..
> -@dirrm share/doc/spim
> +share/doc/spim/spim.ps.gz
> +share/spim/trap.handler
>  @dirrm share/spim
> +@dirrm share/doc/spim

In general, I perfer minial patches to existing files when updating a port.
In this case the 5.9 PLIST is still fine for 6.2.
